INSERT INTO `` (`Id`, `User`, `Host`, `db`, `Command`, `Time`, `State`, `Info`) VALUES (8878359, 'zbzh_admin', '172.62.144.19:59818', 'liangban', 'Query', 0, 'executing', 'SELECT R1.reportInfoId, R1.content, R1.createTime\n        FROM (\n            SELECT r.report_info_id AS reportInfoId,\n                   r.content AS content,\n                   r.create_time AS createTime\n            FROM town_report_info_record r\n            WHERE r.is_deleted = 0\n              AND r.record_type IN (6, 14)\n              AND r.report_info_id IN\n               (  \n                  2067561542248906753\n               , \n                  2059848274084442113\n               , \n                  2055478239744307201\n               , \n                  2054049884935368705\n               , \n                  2047964082157465602\n               , \n                  2044988037540163586\n               , \n                  2042182050957570050\n               , \n                  2039566658703536130\n               , \n                  2034240772341051393\n               , \n                  2029102128387141634\n               , \n                  2029047465478533122\n               , \n                  2021476067591663617\n               , \n                  2018984206637543426\n               , \n                  2017122440777379842\n               , \n                  2014528429893955585\n               , \n                  2013111198169509890\n               , \n                  2008170823965290498\n               , \n                  2005460151842189313\n               , \n                  2003359071746465794\n               , \n                  2003268653314809857\n               ) \n\n            UNION ALL\n\n            SELECT d.report_info_id AS reportInfoId,\n                   r.content AS content,\n                   r.create_time AS createTime\n            FROM town_report_info_record r\n            INNER JOIN town_report_dept d ON r.report_dept_id = d.id AND d.is_deleted = 0\n            WHERE r.is_deleted = 0\n              AND r.record_type IN (6, 14)\n              AND d.report_info_id IN\n               (  \n                  2067561542248906753\n               , \n                  2059848274084442113\n               , \n                  2055478239744307201\n               , \n                  2054049884935368705\n               , \n                  2047964082157465602\n               , \n                  2044988037540163586\n               , \n                  2042182050957570050\n               , \n                  2039566658703536130\n               , \n                  2034240772341051393\n               , \n                  2029102128387141634\n               , \n                  2029047465478533122\n               , \n                  2021476067591663617\n               , \n                  2018984206637543426\n               , \n                  2017122440777379842\n               , \n                  2014528429893955585\n               , \n                  2013111198169509890\n               , \n                  2008170823965290498\n               , \n                  2005460151842189313\n               , \n                  2003359071746465794\n               , \n                  2003268653314809857\n               ) \n        ) R1');

INSERT INTO `` (`Id`, `User`, `Host`, `db`, `Command`, `Time`, `State`, `Info`) VALUES (9211817, 'zbzh_admin', '172.62.144.19:39198', 'zbzs', 'Query', 0, 'executing', 'SELECT count(DISTINCT(R1.id)) as count from (\n        SELECT\n        a.id,\n        a.end_time,\n        substring_index( substring_index( a.place, \',\', b.help_topic_id + 1 ), \',\',- 1 ) as place\n        FROM\n        standing_book a\n        JOIN help_topic1 b ON b.help_topic_id < (\n        length( a.place ) - length(\n        REPLACE ( a.place, \',\', \'\' ))+ 1)\n        )R1 where R1.place = \'22\'\n                 \n                    and R1.end_time >= \'2026-01-01 00:00:00\'\n                 \n                 \n                    and R1.end_time <= \'2026-07-17 59:59:59\'');
